recommendations.title: Shrek 2

recommendations.director: Conrad Vernon, Kelly Asbury, Andrew Adamson

recommendations.title: Hilary and Jackie
recommendations.overview: The tragic story of world-renowned cellist Jacqueline du Pré, as told from the point of view of her sister, flautist Hilary du Pré-Finzi.

recommendations.title: Glee: The Concert Movie
recommendations.overview: A concert documentary shot during the Glee Live! In Concert! summer 2011 tour, featuring song performances and fans' life stories and how the show influenced them.
